fn_def_list.fn_code:
void
md_show_usage (FILE *stream)
{
  fprintf (stream, _("\
RISC-V options:\n\
  -fpic          generate position-independent code\n\
  -fno-pic       don't generate position-independent code (default)\n\
  -march=ISA     set the RISC-V architecture\n\
  -mabi=ABI      set the RISC-V ABI\n\
"));
}

enumerate_node_list:
enum reg_class
{
  RCLASS_GPR,
  RCLASS_FPR,
  RCLASS_CSR,
  RCLASS_MAX
}

enum options
{
  OPTION_MARCH = OPTION_MD_BASE,
  OPTION_PIC,
  OPTION_NO_PIC,
  OPTION_MABI,
  OPTION_END_OF_ENUM
}

enum float_abi {
  FLOAT_ABI_DEFAULT = -1,
  FLOAT_ABI_SOFT,
  FLOAT_ABI_SINGLE,
  FLOAT_ABI_DOUBLE,
  FLOAT_ABI_QUAD
}
